# data/

This folder contains output files generated by the tracker. It is safe to delete these and regenerate them by running `main.py`.

## Video files

Video files are **not stored in this repository**. Download them from the shared folder:

See the [main README](../README.md) for setup instructions on adding video files.

## Generated files

| File | Generated by | Description |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| `results_frames.csv` | `main.py` | Frame-level velocity and timestamp data |
| `results_reps.csv` | `main.py` | Per-rep MCV and PCV metrics |
